heading: Purchase of paper in open market
label: 517 Purchase of paper in open market
text: The Joint Committee on Printing may authorize the Director of the Government Publishing Office to purchase paper in open market when they consider the quantity required so small or the want so immediate as not to justify advertisement for proposals.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 13 (, ; , ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 1128 Stat. 602Mar. 3, 1917, ch. 163, § 639 Stat. 1121
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
